description_long: This is a large, elongated city bus with a predominantly green and white color scheme, featuring a flat roof with a metal luggage rack on one side. The bus has a series of rectangular, evenly spaced windows along both sides, separated by vertical pillars, and displays text in a regional script above the windows. The front of the bus is equipped with a wide windshield, side mirrors, and a prominent grille, while the rear includes a ladder for roof access and additional signage. The wheels are robust and dark-colored, suitable for urban roads, and the bus body is constructed from metal panels with visible seams and trim. The bus also features destination signage on both the front and rear, and the side panels include additional text and striping. The overall design is functional, with clear entry and exit points for passengers and a utilitarian aesthetic typical of public transportation vehicles.
description: A large green and white city bus with rectangular side windows, a roof luggage rack, and destination signage on the front and rear. The bus features metal construction, robust wheels, and clear entry points for passengers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide windshield, destination signage, grille, and side mirrors.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full row of rectangular windows, roof luggage rack, and side text.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the ladder, rear signage, and taillights.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with windows and side text, but without the roof rack.
attribute_window_arrangement: Rectangular windows arranged in a single row along each side, evenly spaced and separated by vertical pillars, with consistent size and shape throughout.
attribute_route_number_or_destination_si: TNSTC, 38, Salem, Attur, Rasipuram, Namakkal, Tiruchengode, Erode
attribute_bus_manufacturer_logo: No distinct manufacturer logo is visible; only route and company text signage is present on the front and rear.
